comment: cycle-109 Sprint 3 T3.1 (FR-3.5 / IMP-009). Canonical dimensions for the 810-cell activation regression matrix. consumers × roles × response_classes × dispatch_paths = 9 × 5 × 6 × 3 = 810.

response_classes.description: Provider returns parseable findings JSON; cheval emits status=APPROVED
KF-002 class — provider returns valid-shape envelope with empty/near-empty content. Expected: voices_dropped[].reason=EmptyContent, blocker_risk=med under impl sprint, aggregate→DEGRADED.
Provider 429. cheval retries within budget; if exhausted, voices_dropped[].reason=RateLimited, blocker_risk=low.
All fallback chain entries fail. voices_dropped[].reason=ChainExhausted, blocker_risk=high (hard rule) → FAILED.
Pre-flight gate (T1.3) preempts before adapter dispatch. voices_dropped[].reason=ContextTooLarge.

dispatch_paths.description: Standard single-call dispatch (no chunking). Most consumers default to this path.
Sprint 4 chunked review at 2 chunks. Tests chunked verdict_quality aggregation.
Sprint 4 chunked review at 5 chunks. Tests larger chunked aggregation + truncation handling.

expected_cells.comment: Total cells = consumers (9) × roles (5) × response_classes (6) × dispatch_paths (3) = 810. Each cell asserts: (1) cheval emits the expected verdict_quality envelope; (2) consumer reads/renders/aggregates correctly; (3) downstream artifact (FL final_consensus.json / adversarial-{review,audit}.json / BB PR comment) carries the expected status.

ci_budget.comment: FR-3.10 / sprint-plan §AC: matrix wall-time <15 min on GitHub Actions. Parallelization: matrix-job per consumer (9 jobs) × strategy.fail-fast=false; per-job sequential roles × response_classes × dispatch_paths (5 × 6 × 3 = 90 cells per job).
